"use strict"; // Note: This file is replaced with "read-wasm-browser.js" when this module is // bundled with a packager that takes package.json#browser fields into account. const fs = require("fs"); const path = require("path"); module.exports = function readWasm() { return new Promise((resolve, reject) => { const wasmPath = path.join(__dirname, "mappings.wasm"); fs.readFile(wasmPath, null, (error, data) => { if (error) { reject(error); return; } resolve(data.buffer); }); }); }; module.exports.initialize = _ => { console.debug( "SourceMapConsumer.initialize is a no-op when running in node.js" ); };
